headline: Texas Instruments Reworks Growth Mix With Silicon Labs Deal And Data Centers
summary: Texas Instruments announced a $7.5b acquisition of Silicon Laboratories to expand its wireless connectivity portfolio and sharpen its focus on Edge AI and IoT. The company guided to rare sequential revenue growth for the upcoming quarter, the first time in roughly 15 years it has done so. Management highlighted a shift toward data centers as a stand alone customer group, with meaningful year over year sales growth from this segment. Texas Instruments, NasdaqGS:TXN, is moving beyond its...

headline: Jim Cramer Highlights Norwegian Cruise Line as a Strategic Target for Disney
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NYSE:NCLH) is one of the stocks in focus this week under Jim Cramer’s game plan.
